scores.correctness_notes: The response correctly describes the Python API layer for the ingress library. The gold standard focuses on the data schema, but the agent's higher-level API (IngressPerAppRequirer, port param, ready/revoked events, url property) accurately reflects the actual library. The gold standard itself acknowledges IngressPerAppRequirer exists.
scores.hallucination_notes: none — IngressPerAppRequirer, IngressPerAppReadyEvent, IngressPerAppRevokedEvent, event.url, is_ready() all exist in the traefik-k8s v2 ingress library
